text: Run a warm-introduction angel sprint for a signed €15k+ commitment
description: Build a named list from Felix and Robin's networks, especially exited founders, developer-tool operators, open-source maintainers, and German AI angels. Target: 25 qualified names, 15 warm asks, 8-10 calls, 2 concrete follow-ups/term discussions. Ask for a small fast commitment or a lead into a larger pre-seed round. Track every contact and next action. Cold VC forms are secondary because institutional processes are unlikely to close by 31 August.

status.comment: Tracker, qualification model, funnel targets, cadence, and call evidence template are ready. Felix/Robin must provide names, authorize messages, and take calls.

reflection: Created outreach-tracker.csv and outreach-process.md in the funding package. The process separates angel, design-partner, and introducer asks; scores warmth, fit, capacity, and timing; defines 25/15/8-10/2 funnel targets; and records dated next actions and evidence.
